questionHtml:
What is the effect of antibiotics on viruses?


A.  Antibiotics have no direct effect on viruses.

B.  Antibiotics affect the metabolism of viruses.

C.  Viruses will evolve to present resistance to the antibiotic.

D.  Antibiotics directly prevent viruses from reproducing.

meta.title: What is the effect of antibiotics on viruses? A. Antibiotics have no direct effect on viruses. B. Antibiotics affect the metabolism of viruses. C. Viruses will evolve to present re
breadcrumbLabels: C3.2.13. Antibiotics as chemicals that block processes occurring in bacteria but not in eukaryotic cells
